name: PAY_EVENT_VALUE_CHANGES_F
description: This table contains specific value changes that qualify a change and cause an event to be raised, or disqualify a change and prevent an event from being raised.

columns.Name: EVENT_VALUE_CHANGE_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: PARENT_EVT_VAL_CHG_ID
columns.Comments: Parent Event Value Change

columns.Name: EVENT_QUALIFIER_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PAY_EVENT_QUALIFIERS_F

columns.Name: DATETRACKED_EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PAY_DATETRACKED_EVENTS

columns.Name: DEFAULT_EVENT
columns.Comments: This denotes whether this is the default event entry

columns.Name: VALID_EVENT
columns.Comments: This value denotes whether this is a valid event to be reported.

columns.Name: LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUPS.

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to FND_TERRITORIES

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ENTERPRISES.

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: FROM_VALUE_OPTION
columns.Comments: FROM_VALUE_OPTION

columns.Name: FROM_VALUE
columns.Comments: The before value to be tested

columns.Name: TO_VALUE_OPTION
columns.Comments: TO_VALUE_OPTION

columns.Name: TO_VALUE
columns.Comments: The after value to be tested.

columns.Name: FORMULA_ID
columns.Comments: Formula to be Used to test a value change

columns.Name: PRORATION_STYLE
columns.Comments: PRORATION_STYLE indicates the type of proration that should occur when this event is encountered.

columns.Name: SEQUENCE
columns.Comments: Sequence of the event value changes

columns.Name: QUALIFIER_VALUE
columns.Comments: QUALIFIER_VALUE contains a derived value that indicates whether the before and after value should be compared.

columns.Name: SEC_QUALIFIER_VALUE
columns.Comments: SEC_QUALIFIER_VALUE

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: SGUID
columns.Comments: The seed global unique identifier. Oracle internal use only.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET1
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET1. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET2
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET2. Context values are Y or N.
